meta.title: 2HELPS2B — seizure risk on continuous EEG
meta.authors: Struck AF, Ustun B, Rodriguez Ruiz A, et al.
meta.outcome: Probability of an electrographic seizure during continuous EEG (cEEG) monitoring in acutely ill / hospitalised patients, from six EEG and clinical features
meta.cff_info:
What this shows. The 2HELPS2B score (Struck et al., JAMA Neurology 2017) estimates the probability that a critically ill / hospitalised patient on continuous EEG (cEEG) will have an electrographic seizure, from six routinely reported EEG/clinical features. Developed on 5,427 cEEG sessions across three centres (AUC 0.82, well calibrated).

How to read it

  • Score 0–7. Seizure risk rises steeply: 0 → 5%, 1 → 12%, 2 → 27%, 3 → 50%, 4 → 73%, 5 → 88%, ≥6 → >95%.
  • It is used to guide how long to monitor: a score of 0 (5% risk) suggests a short screening cEEG may suffice, while higher scores warrant prolonged monitoring. Apply it at the initial reading (first ~30 min) and re-score at 6–8 h if new patterns emerge.
  • Brief (ictal) rhythmic discharges (BIRDs) count 2 points; the other five features count 1 point each.

Demonstration tool — an aid to cEEG interpretation, not a substitute for expert review.

predictors.name: Brief (ictal) rhythmic discharges — B(I)RDs
predictors.assess: Brief potentially ictal rhythmic discharges (BIRDs) on EEG. Present = 2 points (the strongest single feature).

predictors.name: LPDs, LRDA, or BIPDs
predictors.assess: Lateralized periodic discharges (LPDs), lateralized rhythmic delta activity (LRDA), or bilateral independent periodic discharges (BIPDs). Any present = 1 point.

predictors.name: Any periodic/rhythmic pattern > 2 Hz
predictors.assess: Frequency greater than 2.0 Hz for any periodic or rhythmic pattern (GRDA/LRDA/LPDs/BIPDs/GPDs). Present = 1 point.

predictors.name: “Plus” features
predictors.assess: Superimposed rhythmic, sharp, or fast activity ('plus' features) on a periodic/rhythmic pattern. Present = 1 point.

predictors.name: Sporadic epileptiform discharges
predictors.assess: Sporadic (non-periodic, non-rhythmic) epileptiform discharges (spikes/sharp waves). Present = 1 point.

predictors.name: Prior seizure
predictors.assess: Any history of seizure before the EEG — acute or remote. Present = 1 point.

model.panel_title: Probability of a seizure on continuous EEG

model.note: Predicts electrographic seizures on cEEG in acutely ill patients. Max score 7 (no patients scored 7 in the cohort). Use to guide cEEG duration; re-score if new EEG patterns emerge.

provenance.source: Struck 2017 JAMA Neurol Table 2 (probable risk by score) + abstract/text (point assignments) — doi 10.1001/jamaneurol.2017.2459, PMID 29052706
provenance.notes: 2HELPS2B RiskSLIM score. 6 binary features: BIRDs 2pts; (LPDs/LRDA/BIPDs) 1; freq>2Hz 1; plus-features 1; sporadic epileptiform discharges 1; prior seizure 1. Probable seizure risk by total score (Table 2): 0=5,1=12,2=27,3=50,4=73,5=88,>=6=>95%. AUC 0.819. Built 2026-07-08.
